content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 — WARN — Paywall offers Premium reward in exchange for a 5-star review (App/PaywallView.swift:12)
Pierre: Apple prohibits incentivizing reviews or ratings, and offering a free week of Premium for a "5-star review" is a clear quid-pro-quo that may trigger a rejection. The paywall string "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" directly ties a reward to a positive rating. Remove the incentive and the star-rating language, or decouple any reward from leaving a review.
